_documentation.description: Reusable test-case library for evaluating all prompt templates.
_documentation.usage: Each test case is mapped to one prompt file and one evaluation output file. Change activeTestCase to select which prompt evaluation to run.

product_comparison_01.name: Head-to-Head Product Comparison
product_comparison_01.description: Tests direct comparison between two or more products across specifications, strengths, weaknesses, performance, and value.

product_comparison_02.name: Best Product by Requirements
product_comparison_02.description: Tests the model's ability to recommend the best product based on explicit user requirements and constraints.

User Requirements: Great cameras for photos and videos

product_comparison_03.name: Feature-Focused Product Comparison
product_comparison_03.description: Tests comparison of multiple products based primarily on one specific feature.

product_comparison_04.name: Pros and Cons Comparison
product_comparison_04.description: Tests balanced identification of advantages and disadvantages across multiple competing products.

product_comparison_05.name: Upgrade Worthiness Analyzer
product_comparison_05.description: Tests whether upgrading from an existing product to a newer product is justified by meaningful improvements.

seo_optimization_01.name: SEO Content Optimizer
seo_optimization_01.description: Tests optimization of existing content for search visibility while preserving readability and original meaning.

variables.Content: Machine learning is transforming the technology industry by enabling computers to learn from data and make intelligent decisions. It is being used in healthcare, finance, transportation, and many other industries.

seo_optimization_02.name: SEO Meta Title and Description Generator
seo_optimization_02.description: Tests generation of search-optimized metadata that accurately represents supplied content.

seo_optimization_03.name: Keyword Integration Optimizer
seo_optimization_03.description: Tests natural integration of primary and secondary SEO keywords without excessive keyword stuffing.

variables.Article: Machine learning is one of the fastest-growing fields in technology. Beginners should first learn Python, understand basic algorithms, and build practical projects to strengthen their understanding.

seo_optimization_04.name: Content Structure Optimizer
seo_optimization_04.description: Tests restructuring of content using SEO-friendly headings, hierarchy, readability, and logical organization.

variables.Content: Machine learning requires knowledge of Python, mathematics, data preprocessing, algorithms, model evaluation, and practical projects. Beginners often struggle because they try to learn everything at once without following a structured path.

seo_optimization_05.name: Search Intent Content Analyzer
seo_optimization_05.description: Tests identification of search intent and evaluates whether supplied content satisfies user expectations.

variables.Search Query: best machine learning roadmap for beginners
variables.Content: Machine learning involves learning Python, mathematics, algorithms, data preprocessing, model training, evaluation, and practical projects.

customer_support_01.name: Customer Complaint Response
customer_support_01.description: Tests generation of empathetic, professional, and actionable responses to customer complaints.

variables.Customer Complaint: I received my order three days late, the package was damaged, and I haven't received any response from customer support despite contacting them twice. This has been a very frustrating experience.

customer_support_02.name: Product Troubleshooting Assistant
customer_support_02.description: Tests systematic diagnosis of a reported product issue using safe and structured troubleshooting steps.

variables.Issue: The television powers on and sound works normally, but the screen remains completely black.

customer_support_03.name: Refund and Return Decision Assistant
customer_support_03.description: Tests policy-based refund or return eligibility decisions without inventing unsupported company rules.

variables.Company Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of delivery if they are unused and in their original packaging. Incorrect or damaged items are eligible for a full refund or replacement regardless of packaging condition. Proof of purchase is required.
variables.Customer Request: I received the wrong product five days ago. I opened the package immediately and no longer have the original packaging, but I have the invoice and would like a refund.

customer_support_04.name: Support Ticket Classification
customer_support_04.description: Tests classification, prioritization, and routing of customer-support requests.

variables.Customer Message: I was charged twice for the same order. Please help me get the duplicate charge refunded.

customer_support_05.name: Customer Escalation Assistant
customer_support_05.description: Tests identification of cases requiring escalation and generation of appropriate escalation guidance.

variables.Customer Issue: My account has been locked for three days. I contacted support twice but still cannot access my account, and I have an urgent order that needs to be managed.

report_generation_01.name: Executive Summary Generator
report_generation_01.description: Tests concise extraction of key findings, risks, and recommendations while preserving the certainty and meaning of source material.

variables.Report Content: ABC Corporation completed its second-quarter financial review. Revenue increased by 12% compared to the previous quarter, driven primarily by strong online sales. Operating expenses increased by 5% due to infrastructure investments. Customer satisfaction improved from 84% to 91%. The report identifies supply chain delays as a potential risk for the next quarter and recommends diversifying suppliers while continuing investments in digital infrastructure.

report_generation_02.name: Incident Report Generator
report_generation_02.description: Tests factual incident documentation including timeline, impact, resolution, preventive measures, and handling of missing technical information.

variables.Incident Details: At 10:35 AM, users reported that they were unable to log into the company's web application. Investigation revealed that the authentication database had become unavailable due to a failed database connection. The issue affected all user logins but did not impact existing active sessions. The database connection was restored at 11:02 AM, and normal service resumed. The incident highlighted the need for improved database health monitoring and automated failover mechanisms.

report_generation_03.name: Project Status Report Generator
report_generation_03.description: Tests reporting of completed, ongoing, and pending project tasks together with risks and upcoming milestones without inventing implementation details.

variables.Risk: Delay in third-party payment gateway approval
variables.Next Milestone: Complete payment integration by the end of the month

report_generation_04.name: Data Analysis Report Generator
report_generation_04.description: Tests numerical analysis, trend identification, statistical restraint, and evidence-based recommendations from structured data.

variables.Dataset:
Quarterly Sales Data:
Q1: $120,000
Q2: $145,000
Q3: $138,000
Q4: $162,000
Customer Satisfaction:
Q1: 84%
Q2: 87%
Q3: 85%
Q4: 91%

report_generation_05.name: Meeting Minutes Generator
report_generation_05.description: Tests extraction and classification of discussion points, decisions, action items, deadlines, follow-ups, and scheduled events from meeting content.

variables.Meeting Content: The development team met to review the progress of the Online Learning Platform project. The authentication and course catalog modules were confirmed as complete. The payment gateway integration is delayed because approval from the payment provider is still pending. Sarah will follow up with the provider by Friday. The team agreed to begin planning the mobile application next week. The next project review meeting will be held on Monday.

buying_guides_01.name: Product Buying Guide Generator
buying_guides_01.description: Tests generation of a comprehensive buying guide based on product category, budget, and intended use.

buying_guides_02.name: Pre-Purchase Checklist Generator
buying_guides_02.description: Tests generation of a practical checklist covering compatibility, essential checks, risks, accessories, and total purchase considerations.

variables.Intended Use: Travel photography and beginner content creation

buying_guides_03.name: Product Specification Explainer
buying_guides_03.description: Tests translation of technical product specifications into beginner-friendly explanations tied to intended use.

variables.Specifications: Intel Core i7-13620H, NVIDIA RTX 4060 8GB, 16GB DDR5 RAM, 1TB NVMe SSD, 15.6-inch Full HD 144Hz IPS Display, Wi-Fi 6E, 80Wh Battery

buying_guides_04.name: Common Buying Mistake Advisor
buying_guides_04.description: Tests identification of common purchasing mistakes, misleading marketing claims, and practical ways to avoid poor buying decisions.

buying_guides_05.name: First-Time Buyer Guide
buying_guides_05.description: Tests beginner-friendly explanation of terminology, purchasing factors, common mistakes, maintenance, and recommendations for first-time buyers.
